title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
